title: White People Money
overview: MacKenzie Scott, the ex-wife of multi-billionaire Jeff Bezos, pledges to give away 15 billion dollars to 15 winners. Kareem will do anything to get his hands on that money, and when he wins, he will do anything to keep it a secret.
